---
title: "Three Wild Bears (20% Gravel)"
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const title = document.querySelector(".quarto-title h1.title");
  if (!title) {
    return;
  }
  title.innerHTML = title.textContent.replace(
    /(\d+% Gravel)/g,
    '<span style="color: chocolate;">$1</span>',
  );
});
</script>
```



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="31.54" data-elevation="5423.88" data-time="219" data-road-quality="91" data-has-gravel="true">
<div class="mobile-route-heading">

<div class="mobile-route-tags"><span class="mobile-route-tag">3 Bears</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Meadows Canyon ↓</span></div>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>31.54</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>5423.88 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~3:40</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>1.76 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#1a9850;">91%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Map

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/overview_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>17.12</td>
      <td>54.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>3.40</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>3.26</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>3.10</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>2.90</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>1.76</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>3,135</td>
      <td>12.3</td>
      <td>99 ± 47</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Alhambra Valley Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>989</td>
      <td>5.8</td>
      <td>41 ± 17</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Bear Creek Road (1% avg)</td>
      <td>961</td>
      <td>2.4</td>
      <td>22 ± 12</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Bear Creek Road (5% avg)</td>
      <td>307</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Wildcat Canyon Road (3% avg)</td>
      <td>878</td>
      <td>3.7</td>
      <td>31 ± 15</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>3,135</td>
      <td>31.5</td>
      <td>219 ± 91</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>8.2</td>
      <td>49</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Alhambra Valley Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>989</td>
      <td>5.8</td>
      <td>41 ± 17</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Bear Creek Road (1% avg)</td>
      <td>961</td>
      <td>2.4</td>
      <td>22 ± 12</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Bear Creek Road (5% avg)</td>
      <td>307</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Wildcat Canyon Road (3% avg)</td>
      <td>878</td>
      <td>3.7</td>
      <td>31 ± 15</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>9.5</td>
      <td>61</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>11.2</td>
      <td>35.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>6.5</td>
      <td>20.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>5.8</td>
      <td>18.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>3.9</td>
      <td>12.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>2.1</td>
      <td>6.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>4.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
